title: installed-lifecycle-plan-cleanup
outOfScope: creating new remediation Work Items after closure

sources.reason: Final execution plan to mark historical and retain lifecycle evidence.
Plan index status and replacement relationship.

riskAssessment.reason: Cleanup must preserve Contracts, Summaries, release evidence, design specifications, and still-referenced plans while marking this plan historical after all 16 Work Items close.

executionDecision.reason: User explicitly authorized complete serial execution and requested the final plan-cleanup Work Item.

preReviewWarnings: Run link scan before changing or removing any plan material.
Retain this plan as historical evidence after closure.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The plan index and this plan state identify all Work Items 1-16, PRs, release v0.5.36, archive and close evidence.
Link, metadata, terminology, and invariant checks pass after cleanup.
Superseded execution detail is removed or marked historical only after link scanning, while required lifecycle procedure and audit evidence remain.
No new remediation Work Item is created from this plan after closure.
guidelines: Preserve audit history and recovery paths when cleaning plans.
Do not delete referenced governance evidence.

intent.problem: The Installed Lifecycle execution plan remains an active-looking long-form document after every Work Item and the release are complete; it must be closed as historical without losing audit evidence or the lifecycle procedure.
constraints: Retain Contracts, Summaries, Cockpit Status, review/release evidence, design specifications, and referenced plans.
Mark the plan historical and prevent new Work Items from being created from it.
intent.rationale: A final historical marker and concise evidence index reduce operational ambiguity while preserving the full audit trail.

rawUserRequest: 走完当前文档的流程；最后加上清理执行计划文档工单，并完成全部工单的完整 PR、合并、清理分支流程。

declaredIntent.summary: Close and clean the Installed Lifecycle execution plan after release and evidence audit.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Plan marked final and no new Work Items
evidence: final plan marker and plan index

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized the complete serial remediation plan and final execution-plan cleanup.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
